title: agentskills/agentskills
abstract: Specification and documentation for Agent Skills. Defines the standard format, API, and protocols for creating, distributing, and executing portable agent skills across different AI platforms.
abstract_zh: Agent Skills官方规范与文档！定义了创建、分发和跨平台执行可移植Agent技能的标准格式、API和协议。相当于Agent技能界的HTTP协议。
